agent.description: Agent: per-node DaemonSet that watches the MXL domain via fanotify, publishes flow state, and serves the LD_PRELOAD intent socket.

runAsNonRoot.description: fanotify on /run/mxl/domain reads host inodes, so the agent currently runs as root. PSA-restricted environments cannot host the agent without a policy exception.
runAsNonRoot.title: runAsNonRoot

hostPath.description: hostPath layout. The agent mounts the whole /run/mxl so the intent socket lands on the host where consumer pods can see it.
hostPath.title: hostPath

tag.description: Image tag. Empty falls back to `v<Chart.AppVersion>` so a local `helm install ./charts/mxl-k8s` from the repo still resolves to a single bundle version. The published OCI artifact has this field pre-populated at package time to the tag the agent's last release produced; see the chart's GitHub release page for the per-component bundle table.
tag.title: tag

agent.title: agent

crds.description: CRD handling. The chart installs CRDs from its crds/ directory by default. Helm only installs them on first install and never deletes or upgrades them; Flux's HelmRelease.spec.{install,upgrade}.crds governs replace semantics. Set skipInstall=true when CRDs are managed by a separate Kustomization or operator framework.
crds.title: crds

gateway.description: Gateway: per-node DaemonSet that owns libmxl-fabrics handles and moves grains across the wire. Runs with hostNetwork so the fabric endpoint binds the node interface.

add.description: Additional caps beyond what rdma.enabled implies.
add.title: add

bindAddress.description: Bind address for libmxl-fabrics endpoints. Default uses the downward-API POD_IP so each gateway binds its node IP.
bindAddress.title: bindAddress

hostNetwork.description: hostNetwork is required because the libmxl-fabrics TargetInfo embeds the host:port a peer dials; a CNI overlay IP would not be reachable cross-node.
hostNetwork.title: hostNetwork

tag.description: Image tag. Empty falls back to `v<Chart.AppVersion>` so a local `helm install ./charts/mxl-k8s` from the repo still resolves to a single bundle version. The published OCI artifact has this field pre-populated at package time to the tag the gateway's last release produced; see the chart's GitHub release page for the per-component bundle table.
tag.title: tag

enabled.description: Add the capabilities and mounts the verbs/efa providers need.
enabled.title: enabled

gateway.title: gateway

global.description: Global settings inherited by every component unless overridden.

commonAnnotations.description: Annotations added to every object the chart renders.
commonAnnotations.title: commonAnnotations

commonLabels.description: Labels added to every object the chart renders.
commonLabels.title: commonLabels

pullPolicy.description: Default imagePullPolicy. Per-component override wins. @schema enum: ["Always", "IfNotPresent", "Never"] @schema
pullPolicy.title: pullPolicy

pullSecrets.description: Image pull secrets, applied to every Pod.
pullSecrets.title: pullSecrets

registry.description: Container registry prefix. Per-component image.repository is appended to this.
registry.title: registry

global.title: global

namespace.description: Namespace handling. Most Flux users set createNamespace on the HelmRelease and leave namespace.create=false here.

name.description: Namespace the chart's namespaced resources land in. Falls back to .Release.Namespace when empty.
name.title: name

namespace.title: namespace

operator.description: Operator: cluster-wide reconciler for MxlReceiver, MxlFlowMirror, and related CRDs. Single Deployment.

args.description: Extra raw args appended after the structured flags.
args.title: args

leaderElect.description: Enable leader election. Required for replicaCount > 1.
leaderElect.title: leaderElect

digest.description: Image digest. Wins over tag when set. @schema pattern: ^$|^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$ @schema
digest.title: digest

pullPolicy.description: imagePullPolicy override. Empty falls back to global. @schema enum: ["", "Always", "IfNotPresent", "Never"] @schema
pullPolicy.title: pullPolicy

tag.description: Image tag. Empty falls back to `v<Chart.AppVersion>` so a local `helm install ./charts/mxl-k8s` from the repo still resolves to a single bundle version. The published OCI artifact has this field pre-populated at package time to the tag the operator's last release produced; see the chart's GitHub release page for the per-component bundle table.
tag.title: tag

enabled.description: Render a Prometheus Operator ServiceMonitor. Requires the monitoring.coreos.com CRDs to be installed cluster-wide.
enabled.title: enabled

name.description: ServiceAccount name. Empty falls back to a generated name.
name.title: name

operator.title: operator

rbac.description: ClusterRoles and ClusterRoleBindings for every enabled component. Set to false when RBAC is centrally managed.
rbac.title: rbac
